title: xanthophyllum cucullatum
intro: Xanthophyllum cucullatum is a type of plant species in the family Polygalaceae, commonly known as the "umbrella bush" due to its unique shape. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum cucullatum include reducing inflammation, treating wounds and skin conditions, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Xanthophyllum cucullatum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
